title: ohbaea balfourii
intro: Ohbaea balfourii, also known as the Himalayan silver fir or balfour's silver fir, is a species of evergreen tree in the cypress family, Pinaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The extracts of Ohbaea balfourii have been shown to have several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-cancer, and anti-diabetic properties, as well as cardiovascular and neuroprotective effects. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and its essential oil is used in aromatherapy and as a natural insect repellent.
